mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assignments (course_id, title, description, due_date, review_due_date, file_types, max_file_size_mb, peer_review_count, status, created_by) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{dueDate}, #{reviewDueDate}, #{fileTypes}, #{maxFileSizeMb}, #{peerReviewCount}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE assignments SET status = #{status} WHERE assignment_id = #{assignmentId}
